			"C_o":434.109,
			"a":3.62046e-07,
			"C_x":1e+06,
			"iter":10,
			"sei":0.21294,
			"ses":0.00655199,
			"r2":0.983241,
			"slope":0.361889,
			"domain":53,
			"n":54
			}
		]
	}
}
			}
	}
}
